name: Trimble Viewpoint Spectrum Construction Accounting API
what_it_does: Trimble Viewpoint Spectrum construction ERP REST API for construction accounting, job costing, payroll, and project management for specialty subcontractors and mid-market general contractors. Enables AI agents to manage job cost tracking and committed cost reporting for construction cost control automation, handle accounts payable and purchase order workflow for subcontractor and material AP automation, access payroll processing and certified payroll for construction workforce compliance automation, retrieve equipment costing and maintenance tracking for fleet management automation, manage billing and progress billing for AIA-format invoice automation, handle subcontract management and change order tracking for contract control automation, access financial reporting and work-in-progress schedule for construction banking and bonding, retrieve document attachment and project photo for construction documentation automation, manage service dispatch and work order for specialty contractor service operations, and integrate Trimble Spectrum with Trimble Connect, Procore, and payroll processors for construction ERP ecosystem.
use_cases: Tracking job costs from specialty contractor agents
Processing certified payroll from prevailing wage agents
Managing subcontractor AP from payment automation agents
Generating WIP schedules from financial reporting agents
not_for: Large ENR top-100 GC (use Viewpoint Vista or Oracle Primavera)
best_when: A specialty subcontractor (electrical, mechanical, plumbing, HVAC) or mid-market GC wanting AI agents to automate job costing, certified payroll, AP workflow, equipment costing, and financial reporting within Trimble Viewpoint Spectrum.
avoid_when: CERTIFIED PAYROLL DAVIS-BACON ACCURACY FOR FEDERAL PROJECTS: Automated certified payroll generation via Spectrum for federal and federally-assisted projects must apply correct Davis-Bacon Act wage determinations by trade and locality; automated certified payroll filing with incorrect classifications creates debarment and back wage liability. TRIMBLE PORTFOLIO PRODUCT CONFUSION: Trimble Viewpoint includes multiple ERP products — Vista (large GC), Spectrum (mid-market), TeamWork (field collaboration), ProContractor (small contractor); verify which Viewpoint product the customer uses before building integration; Spectrum and Vista APIs differ significantly and are not interchangeable. WIP SCHEDULE BANKING COVENANT ACCURACY: Automated WIP reporting for banking and surety bonding from Spectrum must reflect PM-reviewed percent complete estimates; automated WIP with overstated completion creates bonding fraud and bank covenant misrepresentation.

auth.notes: Trimble Viewpoint Spectrum uses OAuth 2.0 and API key authentication. REST API with JSON. Sunnyvale, California HQ (Trimble Inc., NASDAQ: TRMB). Trimble acquired Viewpoint (Portland OR) in 2018 for $1.2B. Viewpoint Spectrum targets specialty subcontractors and mid-market GC. Viewpoint Vista targets large GC. Trimble construction ERP portfolio: Vista, Spectrum, ProContractor, TeamWork. 8,000+ Viewpoint customers. Competes with Sage 300 CRE, Foundation, and Jonas for specialty contractor ERP.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — annual subscription per user with module licensing
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual per-user subscription; core accounting, job cost, payroll, equipment modules; enterprise pricing with implementation services
pricing.notes: Sunnyvale CA. Trimble NASDAQ:TRMB. Viewpoint acquired 2018 $1.2B. Spectrum targets specialty sub and mid GC. Per-user annual subscription.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; job cost and payroll queries throttled; no webhooks — polling required

known_agent_gotchas: NO WEBHOOKS — SPECTRUM EVENTS REQUIRE POLLING: Trimble Viewpoint Spectrum does not support native webhooks for AP approval, payroll, or billing events; automated construction accounting workflows require scheduled polling synchronized with daily accounting cycles

TRIMBLE VIEWPOINT PRODUCT CONFUSION — SPECTRUM VS VISTA: Trimble Viewpoint portfolio includes Spectrum (mid-market) and Vista (enterprise); APIs are distinct and NOT interchangeable; automated integrations must identify which Viewpoint product is deployed before API implementation — Vista uses Vista Web Services API, Spectrum uses REST API

DAVIS-BACON CERTIFIED PAYROLL TRADE CLASSIFICATION ACCURACY: Automated certified payroll must correctly classify each worker by applicable Davis-Bacon trade (journeyman electrician, pipe fitter, laborer, etc.) for federal prevailing wage compliance; automated classification errors create weekly certified payroll filing violations and debarment risk

Trimble Connect integration data master conflict — Trimble Spectrum and Trimble Connect (BIM collaboration) may share project data with different data masters; automated workflows syncing project data between Spectrum and Connect must establish single system of record to prevent duplicate cost code and project structure conflicts

Spectrum cloud vs on-premise deployment API endpoint — Trimble Spectrum is available as cloud-hosted and on-premise; API endpoint and authentication differ between cloud and on-premise deployment; verify customer deployment type before API implementation; on-premise requires VPN/direct network access from automation host

Equipment costing WBS alignment — automated equipment cost allocation in Spectrum must map equipment usage records to correct WBS (job, phase, cost type); incorrect equipment cost allocation creates job cost inaccuracy and percent complete distortion in WIP reporting
agent_readiness.security_notes: Construction ERP. SOC2. OAuth2/API key. US/AU. Job cost, payroll, and financial data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Construction ERP. SOC2. OAuth2/API key. US/AU. Payroll, financial, and job costing data.
